text: I am struck by the surreal quality of my surroundings. The first scene glows with an almost otherworldly purple, inviting contemplation and a sense of being detached from ordinary time. Entering the next room, the vibrant wall and the research-oriented theme stimulate my curiosity and intellect. I feel quietly inspired and oddly at home among these symbols of inquiry and innovation, as if I've wandered somewhere between an art installation and a laboratory of thought.
